title: Phase 002 — Symbol-to-Architecture Trace Tool (code_graph_trace)
description: ADAPT XCE xce_trace concept: walk symbol → class → module → architectural role using existing CONTAINS edges + Phase 001 HLD classification. New code_graph_trace MCP tool. ~310 LOC: 1 new lib + 1 new handler + 1 tool reg edit + optional code_packages table + optional memoization cache. Depends on Phase 001.
